AWAKENED-AWAKENED.aromaPrinciple: [sine][purple]The Void calls. I answer. The Void calls. I answer. [jitter]I always answer.[/jitter][/purple][/sine]
AWAKENED-AWAKENED.cardsModifierDescripti: Awakened cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
AWAKENED-AWAKENED.description:
The Cult's triumph and immortal dark warlock of the Beyond.
Possesses power over the Void and all other elements.
AWAKENED-AWAKENED.eventDeathPrevention: I am immortal. I cannot be felled by something so trivial.
AWAKENED-AWAKENED.goldMonologue: [sine]Wealth means nothing to one who has transcended mortality... and yet...[/sine]
AWAKENED-AWAKENED.title: The Awakened
